name: Down-Home Fried Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut onion in half and slice.
2. Wash celery and slice diagonally into 1/4-inch strips.
3. Mince garlic and ginger.
4. Finely chop red bell pepper.
5. Heat canola oil in a large, heavy casserole over medium-low heat.
6. Add onions, celery, garlic, and ginger; cook, stirring, for 5 minutes.
7. Add diced red pepper; cook for an additional 3 minutes.
8. Stir in rice, broth, and ham; cook for 2 minutes to mix ingredients.
9. Add shrimp and snow peas; cook for 1 minute longer.
10. Remove from heat and beat eggs with soy sauce in a bowl.
11. Push the cooked rice to the sides of the casserole, creating a well in the center.
12. Return casserole to medium-low heat and pour egg mixture into the well.
13. Stir gently for about 1 minute until eggs are just set.
14. Gently fold the egg-coated ingredients into the rice.
15. Heat through and stir in scallions.
16. Serve immediately.
